result.stdout:
# HelpCommand.Invoke: arguments=
usage: clibright COMMAND [OPTIONS]

Manipulate monitor brightness.

Global options:
  -v, --verbose              Output verbosity. Specify multiple times to
                               increase verbosity further.

Available commands:
        increment            Increment brightness by a percentage
        decrement            Decrement brightness by a given percentage
        get                  Get monitor brightness
        set                  Set brightness to a percentage
        list                 Lists attached monitors
